# Hosting Decoded

> Your insider guide to short-term rental success — tips, strategies, and insights for Airbnb hosts.

Hosting Decoded is an independent editorial resource covering every stage of the short-term rental hosting journey. Content is written for property owners and hosts using platforms like Airbnb, Vrbo, and direct booking sites.

## Topics

- [Hosting 101](/blog/hosting-101): Setting up your first listing, local regulations, photography, and listing optimisation.
- [Guest Experience](/blog/guest-experience): Communication, check-in, amenities, 5-star reviews, and problem resolution.
- [Earnings](/blog/earnings): Dynamic pricing, revenue management, occupancy strategies, and tools.

## Content

- [All Articles](/blog)
- [Getting Started with Airbnb Hosting](/blog/getting-started-airbnb-hosting)
- [The Secret to Consistently Getting 5-Star Reviews](/blog/5-star-reviews)
- [Smart Pricing Strategies to Maximize Your Airbnb Revenue](/blog/pricing-strategies)

## About

Hosting Decoded provides practical, experience-based guidance for short-term rental hosts. Content is updated regularly and covers beginner through advanced strategies.
